shared_attributes.design_principle: simple shapes, clear motion, temporary display

context.role: musical note particle when Echo sings, visualizes singing behavior
context.screen_position: spawns near Echo's beak (x=70, y=50), floats upward and right
context.usage_scenario: spawns continuously during singing state (8 seconds), 1-2 notes visible at a time, floats upward, accompanies actual cockatiel whistle sound

animation.description: spawns near beak, moves upward and slightly right (diagonal) 10-15px over 1 second, fades out in final frames, new note spawns every 0.5 seconds during singing

visual_specification.details: yellow musical note (#FFEC27) matching Echo's crest, 3x5px eighth note shape, spawns every 0.5 seconds during singing state, floats diagonally up-right, disappears after 1 second, max 2 notes visible simultaneously

relationships.differences_from: continuous spawning during singing state (unlike one-time heart particles), diagonal motion (not straight up), accompanies audio (cockatiel whistle)

explicit_negations: no horizontal movement only (must float upward)
no more than 2 notes visible at once
no staff lines or other musical symbols
